programme.desc:
1.4 meters with that wind? Could be worse, could be better; mostly it'll be a workout.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
The 1.4m swell might offer a ride or two before the wind turns it all to soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h NNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.3m swell and cross-shore wind suggest a somewhat bumpy, but potentially rideable session if you're desperate.
🌊 Swell: 1.3m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 42.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.6m

programme.title: 🌊 1.3m @ 8s CROSS

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that wind and a short period, those 1.2m Supertubos might be more like Super-closeouts today.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 37.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m

programme.title: 🌊 1.2m @ 8s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.2m and with that wind, you're more likely to find drama than decent rides out there today.
🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 8s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 37.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.5m
📋 Onshore wind making it messy

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With 1.2m of swell and that wind, today will mostly involve getting sandblasted sideways.

programme.title: 💨 1.2m @ 8s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
A 0.9m swell with that wind suggests a lot of paddling for very little reward today.
🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 24.0km/h NNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 52.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 1.1m
